summary: Iteration 15 - Audio Loading Performance Optimization Tests. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: login, songs page, playback with progress bar, queue sidebar, class mode, profile page. Audio caching optimizations working correctly.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header (public, max-age=86400) is overridden by infrastructure to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' - this is expected in preview environment, backend code is correct

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with admin@fitbeats.com / Admin123! (sets httpOnly cookie)
Backend: GET /api/mixes returns list of mixes
Backend: GET /api/mixes/{mix_id}/audio returns audio content (~47MB WAV files)
Backend: Audio response has Accept-Ranges: bytes header
Backend: GET /api/mixes/{mix_id}/audio with Range header returns 206 partial content
Backend: Range request for middle of file (bytes=1000-2000) works correctly
Backend: Disk cache performance test - second request served from cache
Backend: POST /api/mixes/preload endpoint exists and accepts mix_ids
Backend: Preload with empty list returns {preloaded: 0}
Backend: Preload endpoint requires authentication (returns 401 without auth)
Backend: Preload with invalid mix_ids returns {preloaded: 0}
Frontend: Login works and redirects to /
Frontend: Songs page loads with all songs showing duration (4:05 for TABATA, 7:04 for TRADITIONAL)
Frontend: Clicking a song starts playback - player bar shows song info
Frontend: Progress bar advances (timer goes from 0:04 to 0:09 during test)
Frontend: Queue sidebar shows tracks (Cola de reproducción)
Frontend: Class mode page loads with HIIT Session 30min (2 canciones)
Frontend: Profile page loads with user info and Spotify connect option
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py: Disk cache at /tmp/fitbeats_audio_cache/ correctly implemented with atomic writes (tmp file then rename)
Backend server.py: get_cached_audio() function properly checks disk cache before downloading from object storage
Backend server.py: Range request support (206 partial content) correctly implemented for seeking
Backend server.py: POST /api/mixes/preload endpoint limits to 5 tracks max per request
Frontend MainLayout.js: Immediate network play implemented - audio.src set to network URL first, then IndexedDB check in parallel
Frontend MainLayout.js: Preload of next 2 tracks via POST /api/mixes/preload working correctly
Cache-Control header set to 'public, max-age=86400' in backend but overridden by preview infrastructure - will work correctly in production
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified all audio loading performance optimizations: 1) Backend disk cache at /tmp/fitbeats_audio_cache/ working - files cached after first download. 2) POST /api/mixes/preload endpoint working - warms cache for upcoming tracks. 3) Range requests (206 partial content) working for seeking. 4) Accept-Ranges: bytes header present. 5) Frontend plays audio immediately from network, checks IndexedDB in parallel. 6) Frontend preloads next 2 tracks via preload endpoint. Cache-Control header is overridden by preview infrastructure but backend code is correct. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend playback working with progress bar advancing.

features_verified.range_requests: WORKING - 206 partial content with Content-Range header
features_verified.cache_control_header: BACKEND CORRECT (public, max-age=86400) - overridden by preview infrastructure
features_verified.immediate_network_play: WORKING - audio loads from network immediately
features_verified.parallel_indexeddb_check: WORKING - IndexedDB checked in parallel, switches to blob if cached
features_verified.next_track_preload: WORKING - preloads next 2 tracks in queue
